import{useState,useCallback,useEffect}from'react';const SECRET_PIN='246800';const MAX_ATTEMPTS=5;export function usePinInput(){let{onSuccess}=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const[digits,setDigits]=useState([]);const[status,setStatus]=useState('idle');const[attempts,setAttempts]=useState(0);const[shake,setShake]=useState(false);const triggerShake=useCallback(()=>{setShake(true);setTimeout(()=>setShake(false),600);},[]);const handleKey=useCallback(key=>{if(status==='success')return;if(digits.length>=6)return;const next=[...digits,key];setDigits(next);if(next.length===6){if(next.join('')===SECRET_PIN){setStatus('success');onSuccess===null||onSuccess===void 0?void 0:onSuccess();}else{const newAttempts=attempts+1;setAttempts(newAttempts);setStatus('error');triggerShake();setTimeout(()=>{setDigits([]);setStatus('idle');},900);}}},[digits,status,attempts,onSuccess,triggerShake]);const handleDelete=useCallback(()=>{if(status==='success')return;setDigits(prev=>prev.slice(0,-1));if(status==='error')setStatus('idle');},[status]);const reset=useCallback(()=>{setDigits([]);setStatus('idle');setAttempts(0);setShake(false);},[]);// Keyboard support
useEffect(()=>{const onKeyDown=e=>{if(e.key>='0'&&e.key<='9')handleKey(e.key);if(e.key==='Backspace')handleDelete();};window.addEventListener('keydown',onKeyDown);return()=>window.removeEventListener('keydown',onKeyDown);},[handleKey,handleDelete]);return{digits,status,attempts,shake,handleKey,handleDelete,reset,remaining:MAX_ATTEMPTS-attempts};}
